statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
3a4,5
> Mar 19 19:40:57 18d8260c7db4 pmcd[1181341]: Signal 15 (TERM) caught by ps (3.3.12).
> Mar 19 19:40:57 18d8260c7db4 pmcd[1181341]: ps:ps/display.c:66: please report this bug
25a28,30
> Mar 19 19:55:32 18d8260c7db4 pmlogctl[1381173]: Warning: is another pmlogctl job running concurrently?
> Mar 19 19:55:32 18d8260c7db4 pmlogctl[1381173]: ---------- 1 root root 8 Mar 19 19:54 /etc/pcp/pmlogger/lock
> Mar 19 19:55:32 18d8260c7db4 pmlogctl[1381173]: Error: failed to acquire exclusive lock (/etc/pcp/pmlogger/lock) ...
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
